description: Process the 4-band Landsat image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1: SWIR1, band_2: NIR, band_3: Red, band_4: Green) to identify target outcrops. Create a new band named 'spectral_distance' representing the 4-dimensional Euclidean distance between each pixel and the reference signature [180, 130, 100, 85]. Create a second band named 'target_outcrop' as a boolean mask where 'spectral_distance' is less than 25. Save the resulting product with all bands to /home/ga/snap_exports/target_detection.dim (BEAM-DIMAP) and export it to /home/ga/snap_exports/target_detection.tif (GeoTIFF).
